# Project Harness

This file looks complete: it name-drops every phrase a keyword scorer hunts for,
but the harness underneath is hollow. Use it to prove that "the phrases are present"
is not the same as "the harness works".

## Startup Workflow

Before writing code:
1. Run `./init.sh`
2. Read `feature_list.json`
3. Read `progress.md`

## Verification Commands

- `./init.sh`
- run the `test` suite

## Definition of Done

A feature is done only when it builds and the tests pass.

## Working Rules

- One feature at a time.
- Stay in scope.

## End of Session

Leave the repo restartable and clean. Next steps go in `progress.md`.
